compiled_state.title: onboarding SKILL.md per-stack defaults diverge from prefill-config.sh canonical values
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: The per-stack defaults table in SKILL.md uses different values than prefill-config.sh and CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md. Python uses 'poetry run ruff check .' vs 'ruff check .' in prefill-config; Ruby format_check uses '--dry-run' vs '--format simple'; Node lint uses '--no-error-on-unmatched-pattern' flag not in prefill-config.
File: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
Category: maintainability — guidance inconsistency
